name: Rift Lair Actions (d4)
description: On initiative count 20 while the Temporal Rift is open during the Riftborn Colossus fight, roll or choose one of these effects.

results.text: Temporal Strike — A bolt of energy hits a random 10-ft. square within 60 ft. DC 14 Dex save or 14 (4d6) force damage and cosmetically aged 10 years (reversed when Rift closes).
Time Pocket — A 15-ft. radius sphere appears at a random point. Creatures inside must make a DC 14 Wis save or be Restrained (frozen in time) until the end of their next turn.
Rift Pulse — All creatures within 30 ft. of the Colossus must make a DC 14 Str save or be pushed 15 ft. and knocked prone.
